title: Forest Focus
description: Step into a sun-dappled forest where birdsong and rustling leaves clear your mind and sharpen attention.

title: Ocean Calm
description: Let the slow rhythm of ocean waves wash over you, releasing tension and restoring a sense of ease.

title: Deep Sleep
description: A blend of low-frequency tones and soft rainfall designed to guide you gently into deep, restorative sleep.

title: Mountain Reset
description: Breathe in crisp mountain air. This session resets your nervous system and washes away mental fatigue.

title: Rain Studio
description: The gentle drumming of rain on glass creates the perfect acoustic cocoon for deep, uninterrupted work.

title: Twilight Wind Down
description: As the day fades to dusk, let this ambient blend ease you out of busyness and into quiet presence.
